## Entities.Journal.AnyJournalRecord type

Discriminated union of all journal record types. Use type guards to narrow to specific types.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyJournalRecord = IFillingRecipeJournalRecord | IConfectionJournalRecord;
```
